response_text:
# Weekly Workout Plan

## Monday – Upper Body Strength
- Warm-up: 5 min cardio
- Bench press or push-ups: 3×8-10
- Rows: 3×8-10
- Shoulder press: 3×10
- Cool-down: stretching

## Tuesday – Cardio & Core
- 20-30 min steady cardio (running, cycling, rowing)
- Planks: 3×30-60 sec
- Crunches: 3×15
- Dead bugs: 3×12

## Wednesday – Rest or Light Activity
- Yoga, walking, or stretching (20-30 min)

## Thursday – Lower Body Strength
- Warm-up: 5 min cardio
- Squats: 3×8-10
- Deadlifts: 3×6-8
- Lunges: 3×10 each leg
- Calf raises: 3×15
- Cool-down: stretching

## Friday – Full Body & Conditioning
- Circuit format (repeat 3-4 rounds):
  - Burpees: 10
  - Kettlebell swings: 15
  - Mountain climbers: 20
  - Rest: 60 sec

## Saturday – Active Recovery
- 30-45 min low-intensity activity (hiking, swimming, casual cycling)

## Sunday – Rest Day
- Complete rest or gentle stretching

---

**Tips:** Adjust intensity based on fitness level, stay hydrated, and prioritize form over weight. Consult a trainer if new to exercise.
